name: nRF24_jammer
description: The nRF24 jammer is a powerful tool that requires an ESP32 and configurable numbers of NRF24 modules to assemble. It is designed to create interference, disrupting the normal operation of Bluetooth devices 🔊, BLE technology 📱, drones 🚁, Wi-Fi networks 📶 and Zigbee 📡. Additionally, it features a user-friendly web interface 🌐.
